title: Oil gains as OPEC warns of a tight market
section_path: Oil gains as OPEC warns of a tight market
section_path_text: Oil gains as OPEC warns of a tight market
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A loss in momentum in China's property sector weighed on industrial metals. Oil gained amid the prospect of tight supplies in coming months. Crude oil rallied to a 10-month high after OPEC forecast a significantly tight market.
